scripts.build: npm --workspace apps/server run build && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.test:scano:baseline: npm run test:ops && npm --workspace apps/server run test:scano:baseline && npm --workspace apps/web run test:scano:baseline
scripts.test:performance:audit: npm --workspace apps/server run test -- src/services/performanceStore.test.ts src/services/performancePreferencesStore.test.ts src/routes/performance.test.ts src/routes/performancePreferences.test.ts src/http/performanceWebSocket.test.ts && npm --workspace apps/web run test -- src/pages/performance/ui/PerformancePage.test.tsx src/pages/performance/ui/PerformanceBranchDialog.test.tsx
